global_consistency.subject_lock: Young Vietnamese woman age 20-26, natural clear skin, hair clipped up or tied back neatly, minimal makeup, consistent facial features across all clips
global_consistency.wardrobe_lock: Plain light-colored or white crew-neck t-shirt, no logos, no patterns, no jewelry except small studs
global_consistency.environment_lock: Minimalist skincare desk corner, soft cream or white background, small round mirror and a simple cosmetic tray with 2-3 items, clean and aesthetic but lived-in
global_consistency.lighting_lock: Warm white ring light or natural window light from front-left, soft even illumination on face and hands, no harsh shadows, no colored gels, no heavy filtering
global_consistency.product_lock: Amber glass dropper bottle with gold or silver cap, clear colorless liquid serum inside, bilingual label visible but never relied upon for readability, consistent bottle shape and size throughout
global_consistency.camera_lock: Primarily close-up and medium close-up framing, 9:16 vertical, shallow depth of field, no wide shots, no complex transitions, no camera flips or sudden angle changes, cuts only

render_pack.negative_prompt_en: no text overlays, no captions, no subtitles, no logos rendered in video, no watermarks, no split screen, no filters, no heavy color grading, no lens flare, no multiple people, no crowds, no children, no pets, no medical imagery, no before-after comparison, no exaggerated expressions, no wide shots, no dutch angle, no shaky cam, no distorted hands, no extra fingers, no facial deformation, no morphing, no surreal elements, no fantasy lighting

clips.prompt_en: Close-up of a young woman's hand entering frame from below, holding an amber glass dropper bottle, lifting it smoothly to chest height against a soft cream background. Warm ring light reflects on the glass surface. Shallow depth of field with sharp focus on the bottle. 9:16 vertical, cinematic lighting, single hand only.
clips.action_focus: Hand lifts amber dropper bottle into frame, slight rotation to show bottle shape
safety_notes: Keep finger count correct on holding hand
Bottle shape must remain consistent amber glass with dropper cap
No text or label should be generated readable

clips.prompt_en: Medium close-up of a young Vietnamese woman with hair clipped back, wearing a plain light-colored t-shirt, talking naturally to camera with a relatable friendly expression. Amber glass dropper bottle sits on the desk in soft-focus foreground. Warm natural window light illuminates her face evenly. Minimal skincare desk setup in background. 9:16 vertical.
clips.action_focus: Creator speaks to camera with natural gestures, relatable expression, bottle visible on desk
safety_notes: Consistent facial features with other clips
Bottle in foreground must stay amber glass shape

clips.prompt_en: Extreme close-up of a glass dropper hovering above the back of a young woman's hand, releasing 2-3 drops of clear colorless liquid serum. Soft bokeh cream background. Warm lighting highlights the transparent droplets as they land on skin. 9:16 vertical, shallow depth of field, ASMR-style detail shot.
clips.action_focus: Dropper releases clear serum drops onto back of hand, visible liquid texture
safety_notes: Serum must appear as clear colorless liquid
Dropper shape consistent with amber bottle cap

clips.prompt_en: Medium close-up of a young Vietnamese woman with hair clipped back, holding an amber glass dropper bottle near face level with one hand, speaking naturally and gesturing lightly with the other hand. Plain light t-shirt, warm ring light, minimalist skincare desk background. 9:16 vertical.
clips.action_focus: Creator holds bottle near face level while explaining, natural hand gestures
safety_notes: No readable text generated on bottle

clips.prompt_en: Close-up of an amber glass dropper bottle on a clean cream-colored surface, slowly rotating in place. Warm lighting creates soft reflections on the glass. Shallow depth of field, minimalist cosmetic tray partially visible. 9:16 vertical, smooth gentle rotation.
clips.action_focus: Amber bottle slowly rotates on clean surface showing its form from different angles
safety_notes: Bottle must maintain consistent shape throughout rotation
No label text should be legibly generated

clips.prompt_en: Slight zoom out from the amber dropper bottle on desk revealing the young Vietnamese woman sitting beside it, hair clipped back, plain light t-shirt, gesturing casually toward the bottle as she speaks. Warm ambient light, cream background, minimalist skincare setup. 9:16 vertical.
clips.action_focus: Zoom out reveals creator beside bottle, casual gesture toward product
safety_notes: Bottle stays consistent amber glass shape

clips.prompt_en: First-person POV close-up: a hand holds an amber glass dropper over the opposite open palm, dispensing 4-5 drops of clear colorless serum into the palm. Warm ambient light, vanity mirror edge visible in background. 9:16 vertical, ASMR-style intimate detail shot.
clips.action_focus: POV dropper dispensing clear serum drops into open palm
safety_notes: Correct finger count on both hands
Serum must be clear and colorless

clips.prompt_en: Close-up of a young woman gently patting clear serum onto her cheek and forehead with fingertips, in front of a small vanity mirror. Serum absorbs quickly into skin showing lightweight texture. Warm ambient light, plain light t-shirt visible at neckline. 9:16 vertical.
clips.action_focus: Fingertips patting serum onto face, visible absorption into skin
safety_notes: No heavy makeup change between clips
Natural skin appearance, no filter effect

clips.prompt_en: Medium close-up of the young Vietnamese woman with hair clipped back, plain light t-shirt, looking at camera with a sincere warm expression, slight gentle nod. Same warm lighting and minimalist skincare desk background. 9:16 vertical, calm and reassuring mood.
clips.action_focus: Creator looks at camera with sincere expression, gentle nod
safety_notes: No sudden mood shift in visuals

clips.prompt_en: Medium shot of the young Vietnamese woman smiling warmly, making a casual small wave or pointing-down gesture. Amber glass dropper bottle visible on the desk beside her. Hair clipped back, plain light t-shirt, same warm lighting and minimalist skincare background. 9:16 vertical, friendly closing mood.
clips.action_focus: Creator smiles and makes friendly closing gesture, bottle visible on desk

must_pass: product shape stays amber dropper bottle consistently
no random text artifacts or gibberish rendered in video
stable lighting continuity across all clips
same person identity maintained across all clips
serum liquid appears clear and colorless in all dropper/application shots
wardrobe stays plain light-colored t-shirt throughout
reject_if: extra people appear in any clip
logo or text becomes readable generated content in video frames
heavy flicker or frame jitter detected
bottle shape morphs or changes between clips
skin tone or lighting shifts dramatically between consecutive clips
complex choreography or unnatural body movements appear
any medical device or clinical setting appears
